reviews.comment:
Exelente!! Hermoso lugar para pasar la noche, duchas con agua caliente a 150 por persona. Tranquilo Recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!! Beautiful place to spend the night, hot showers for 150 per person. Quiet. I recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Poca variedad de comidas
Escaso personal para atención al cliente
Ambiente bueno
FALTA: Cargador de teléfono más accesible

(Translated by Google)
Limited food selection
Insufficient customer service staff
Nice atmosphere
MISSING: More accessible phone charger

reviews.comment:
El peor servicio del Automóvil Club Argentino en todo el país. Apenas 1 o 2 playeros cuanto mucho para atender 8 bahías de carga. Trato de no parar.

(Translated by Google)
The worst service at the Automóvil Club Argentino in the entire country. Barely one or two attendants at most to service eight loading bays. I try not to stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNHFXODV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios , nunca tiene sistema de serviclub y mi señora se olvidó el celu en el mostrador y dijeron que no había nada hasta que llamamos y lo encontraron adentro de la cocina

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, there is never a service club system and my wife forgot her cell phone on the counter and they said there was nothing there until we called and they found it inside the kitchen.

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay problemas con Internet por lo que es imposible pagar con Qr o débitos ya que los posnet no andan bien o no andan.

(Translated by Google)
There are always problems with the Internet, so it's impossible to pay with QR or debit cards because the POS terminals don't work properly or don't work at all.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención bastante completo lo que ofrecen. A pesar de lo inhospito del lugar. Baños aceptables , había personal limpiando, faltaba artículo de higiene.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, quite comprehensive in what they offer, despite the inhospitable location. Acceptable bathrooms, there was staff cleaning, but toiletries were missing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeUllOUVREAE
